column1: # Publishes the ambiguous_nodes_X_annogroups deliverables: per annotation source,
# the annogroup x ambiguous-node projections in three structure scopes (one /
# some / all), plus the ambiguous-node registry and the validation report.
# Source globs are relative to this manifest's directory (the
# Build with (from the integrator subproject root):
# This is a COPYME template (single source of truth). The discovery helper
# ignores manifests in workflow-COPYME-* dirs; copy this file into the canonical
# workflow-RUN_* dir for it to publish (per gigantic_conventions §38/§39).
# ----- Headline deliverables: the three scoped projections (per source) -----

column4: ALL scope — annogroups x ambiguous nodes (all structures)
column6: Per annotation source: each annogroup's member-protein count at every AMBIGUOUS NODE (a clade present in some but not all species-tree structures — the unresolved basal-metazoan groupings) across ALL structures. Fixed backbone clades are dropped; the leading columns carry the annogroup identity (id, type, defining features, definitions, sequence/species counts, species list).

column4: ONE scope — annogroups x ambiguous nodes (one structure)
column6: Per annotation source: the same projection restricted to the ambiguous nodes of ONE chosen species-tree structure (its particular resolution of the basal-metazoan branching order).

column4: SOME scope — annogroups x ambiguous nodes (subset of structures)
column6: Per annotation source: the projection restricted to the ambiguous nodes appearing across a user-chosen SUBSET of species-tree structures.

Per annotation source: one row per ambiguous node (clade present in fewer than all structures) with its descendant-species count, how many structures it appears in, and membership flags for the one / some / all scopes. The map of which contested nodes exist and which scopes include them.

Fail-fast validation cross-checks (identity-column match, every projected column is an ambiguous node, one/some/all clade-set correctness, row-count preservation, registry consistency). Status PASS means every cross-check held.
